ddls:
CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of portfolio (e.g., aggressive, conservative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the portfolio (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio manager */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Current total value of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the benchmark was first used */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the benchmark was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of strategy (e.g., value, growth) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was last updated */,
  "performance_target" REAL /* Target performance for the strategy */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the strategy (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "strategy_document" TEXT /* URL or path to the strategy document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "multipliers" (
  "multiplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each multiplier */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy the multiplier belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the multiplier */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the multiplier was first used */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the multiplier was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("multiplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_multipliers_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the performance record belongs to */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark used for performance evaluation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the performance record is for */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the portfolio at the end of the year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was last updated */,
  "performance_target" REAL /* Target performance for the year */,
  "performance_variance" REAL /* Variance from the performance target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_performance" (
  "strategy_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy performance record */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy the performance record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the performance record is for */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the strategy at the end of the year */,
  "won" TEXT /* Whether the strategy won (i.e., outperformed the benchmark) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy performance record was last updated */,
  "performance_target" REAL /* Target performance for the year */,
  "performance_variance" REAL /* Variance from the performance target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_performance_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the portfolio */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the dashboard belongs to */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_date" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_strategy" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "strategy_id")
)
